acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Reviews start only after exact candidate HEAD is confirmed remotely
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: CandidateHead confirms a clean local SHA and the exact non-force remote branch SHA before each review cycle.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Repairs republish and reconfirm the new HEAD
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Every repair re-enters review_and_repair and executes CandidateHead.confirm before specialist sessions.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Remote divergence fails closed without force push
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: CandidateHead uses guarded push and tests rejection, remote mismatch, lost responses, and recovery without any force option.
Recovery tests cover published candidate reconstruction and inaccessible historical evidence.
329 tests, 0 failures, 2 intentional skips, 100% coverage, formatting, Credo and Dialyzer all clean.

summary: Every implementation and repair candidate is now durably confirmed at an exact remote HEAD before review or final evidence.
